entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L) Millsp., the crop species being studied

entities.name: CORKY-STEM
entities.description: A mutant trait characterized by cork formation on stems and branches

entities.name: INHERITANCE STUDY
entities.description: Analysis of trait inheritance using F1, F2, and BC1F1 generations of two crosses

entities.name: SM
entities.description: A recessive allele that governs the corky-stem character

entities.name: CK
entities.description: A dominant allele that governs the corky-stem character

entities.name: SMOOTH STEM SURFACE
entities.description: The phenotype resulting from the dominant form of the sm allele masking the Ck allele

entities.name: PERIDERM LAYER
entities.description: A biological layer whose development leads to cork formation and is typically absent in pigeonpea stems

relationships.description: Used to study the inheritance of the trait
Governs the expression of the trait
Governs the expression of the trait
Dominant form of sm allele masks the expression of the Ck allele
Dominant form results in this phenotype
Development of this layer causes cork formation
